message: feat: expand fnp-python parity for mutation and index helpers (franken_numpy-72oe franken_numpy-ukam franken_numpy-beiq)

-| fnp-python | 57 | PyO3 package surface coverage for `frompyfunc`, `vectorize`, `digitize`, `searchsorted`, `interp`, `where`, `flatnonzero`, `argwhere`, `count_nonzero`, `isposinf`, `isneginf`, `signbit`, `isnan`, `isinf`, `isfinite`, `spacing`, `sign`, `floor`, `ceil`, `trunc`, `rint`, `degrees`, `radians`, `sinc`, `copysign`, `nextafter`, `hypot`, `ldexp`, `logaddexp`, `logaddexp2`, `frexp`, `modf`, `nan_to_num`, `take`, `take_along_axis`, `compress`, `extract`, `select`, and `choose`, including live callable parity, sorter/side bridging, left/right fill parity, one-argument nonzero parity, flat/coordinate nonzero wrappers, `count_nonzero(axis, keepdims)` parity, `isposinf`/`isneginf`/`signbit`/`isnan`/`isinf`/`isfinite`/`spacing`/`sign`/`floor`/`ceil`/`trunc`/`rint`/`degrees`/`radians`/`sinc`/`copysign`/`nextafter`/`hypot`/`ldexp`/`logaddexp`/`logaddexp2`/`frexp`/`modf`/`nan_to_num` oracle parity, `take(axis)` reshape/scalar semantics, `axis=None` flatten semantics, short-condition truncation parity, first-match `select` behavior, large-uint64 coverage, full `choose(mode='raise'|'wrap'|'clip')` parity, integer exponent tuple output for `frexp`, signed fractional/integral tuple parity for `modf`, scalar replacement parity for `nan_to_num`, and module export wiring |
+| fnp-python | 67 | PyO3 package surface coverage for `frompyfunc`, `vectorize`, `digitize`, `searchsorted`, `interp`, `where`, `flatnonzero`, `argwhere`, `count_nonzero`, `isposinf`, `isneginf`, `signbit`, `isnan`, `isinf`, `isfinite`, `spacing`, `sign`, `floor`, `ceil`, `trunc`, `rint`, `degrees`, `radians`, `sinc`, `copysign`, `nextafter`, `hypot`, `ldexp`, `logaddexp`, `logaddexp2`, `frexp`, `modf`, `nan_to_num`, `take`, `put`, `take_along_axis`, `put_along_axis`, `compress`, `extract`, `place`, `putmask`, `diag_indices`, `diag_indices_from`, `tril_indices`, `tril_indices_from`, `triu_indices`, `triu_indices_from`, `select`, and `choose`, including live callable parity, sorter/side bridging, left/right fill parity, one-argument nonzero parity, flat/coordinate nonzero wrappers, `count_nonzero(axis, keepdims)` parity, `isposinf`/`isneginf`/`signbit`/`isnan`/`isinf`/`isfinite`/`spacing`/`sign`/`floor`/`ceil`/`trunc`/`rint`/`degrees`/`radians`/`sinc`/`copysign`/`nextafter`/`hypot`/`ldexp`/`logaddexp`/`logaddexp2`/`frexp`/`modf`/`nan_to_num` oracle parity, `take(axis)` reshape/scalar semantics, in-place `put`/`place`/`putmask` copy-back semantics, diagonal/triangle index tuple parity, shape-only `*_from` wrappers for arbitrary ndarray dtypes, `axis=None` flatten semantics for `take_along_axis` and `put_along_axis`, overlap-safe view mutation parity, short-condition truncation parity, first-match `select` behavior, large-uint64 coverage, full `choose(mode='raise'|'wrap'|'clip')` parity, integer exponent tuple output for `frexp`, signed fractional/integral tuple parity for `modf`, scalar replacement parity for `nan_to_num`, and module export wiring |

 ## Remaining Gaps (Python-specific, low priority)
 
-1. Expanded Python package surface beyond `nditer`, `frompyfunc`, `vectorize`, `digitize`, `searchsorted`, `interp`, `where`, `flatnonzero`, `argwhere`, `count_nonzero`, `isposinf`, `isneginf`, `signbit`, `isnan`, `isinf`, `isfinite`, `spacing`, `sign`, `floor`, `ceil`, `trunc`, `rint`, `degrees`, `radians`, `sinc`, `copysign`, `nextafter`, `hypot`, `ldexp`, `logaddexp`, `logaddexp2`, `frexp`, `modf`, `nan_to_num`, `take`, `take_along_axis`, `compress`, `extract`, `select`, and `choose` — `fnp-python` now exposes `PyNditer`, `frompyfunc`, `vectorize`, `digitize`, `searchsorted`, `interp`, `where`, `flatnonzero`, `argwhere`, `count_nonzero`, `isposinf`, `isneginf`, `signbit`, `isnan`, `isinf`, `isfinite`, `spacing`, `sign`, `floor`, `ceil`, `trunc`, `rint`, `degrees`, `radians`, `sinc`, `copysign`, `nextafter`, `hypot`, `ldexp`, `logaddexp`, `logaddexp2`, `frexp`, `modf`, `nan_to_num`, `take`, `take_along_axis`, `compress`, `extract`, `select`, and `choose`, but broader Python-facing packaging and FFI coverage for additional NumPy APIs is still incomplete
+1. Expanded Python package surface beyond `nditer`, `frompyfunc`, `vectorize`, `digitize`, `searchsorted`, `interp`, `where`, `flatnonzero`, `argwhere`, `count_nonzero`, `isposinf`, `isneginf`, `signbit`, `isnan`, `isinf`, `isfinite`, `spacing`, `sign`, `floor`, `ceil`, `trunc`, `rint`, `degrees`, `radians`, `sinc`, `copysign`, `nextafter`, `hypot`, `ldexp`, `logaddexp`, `logaddexp2`, `frexp`, `modf`, `nan_to_num`, `take`, `put`, `take_along_axis`, `put_along_axis`, `compress`, `extract`, `place`, `putmask`, `diag_indices`, `diag_indices_from`, `tril_indices`, `tril_indices_from`, `triu_indices`, `triu_indices_from`, `select`, and `choose` — `fnp-python` now exposes `PyNditer`, `frompyfunc`, `vectorize`, `digitize`, `searchsorted`, `interp`, `where`, `flatnonzero`, `argwhere`, `count_nonzero`, `isposinf`, `isneginf`, `signbit`, `isnan`, `isinf`, `isfinite`, `spacing`, `sign`, `floor`, `ceil`, `trunc`, `rint`, `degrees`, `radians`, `sinc`, `copysign`, `nextafter`, `hypot`, `ldexp`, `logaddexp`, `logaddexp2`, `frexp`, `modf`, `nan_to_num`, `take`, `put`, `take_along_axis`, `put_along_axis`, `compress`, `extract`, `place`, `putmask`, `diag_indices`, `diag_indices_from`, `tril_indices`, `tril_indices_from`, `triu_indices`, `triu_indices_from`, `select`, and `choose`, but broader Python-facing packaging and FFI coverage for additional NumPy APIs is still incomplete
 2. Expanded CI matrix for alternate oracle environments and longer-horizon benchmark trend regression
 
 ## Intentional Design Decisions

@@ -689,6 +689,13 @@ FrankenNumPy implements the full set of NumPy's array construction and manipulat
 | `compress(condition, axis)` | Select elements where boolean condition is true |
 | `extract(condition, arr)` | Flat extraction by boolean mask |
 | `place(mask, vals)` | In-place replacement where mask is true (cyclic values) |
+| `putmask(mask, values)` | In-place masked scatter with cyclic value repetition |
+| `diag_indices(n, ndim)` | Tuple of diagonal index arrays |
+| `diag_indices_from(arr)` | Diagonal index tuple inferred from array shape |
+| `tril_indices(n, k, m)` | Lower-triangle row/column index tuple |
+| `tril_indices_from(arr, k)` | Lower-triangle index tuple inferred from array shape |
+| `triu_indices(n, k, m)` | Upper-triangle row/column index tuple |
+| `triu_indices_from(arr, k)` | Upper-triangle index tuple inferred from array shape |
 | `select(condlist, choicelist, default)` | Choose from multiple arrays by first-matching condition |
 | `piecewise(condlist, funclist)` | Piecewise constant function via condition list |
 | `take_along_axis(indices, axis)` | Gather values along axis by index array |
